exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your relationship dating forward
items: Create a written list of your core values and non-negotiable relationship requirements
Complete a comprehensive self-assessment of your attachment style and relationship patterns
Schedule and complete a comprehensive health checkup including STI testing and discuss family planning goals with your doctor
Research and join 2-3 social activities, clubs, or hobby groups where you can meet like-minded people naturally
Interview 3-5 friends or family members about their successful long-term relationships to identify common patterns and advice
Create a detailed personal inventory of your emotional readiness, life goals, and relationship timeline
